name: Classover Holdings, Inc.
summary: PART I Our Mission We operate through our wholly-owned subsidiary Class Over Inc. We provide comprehensive online interactive live courses for K-12 students in the United States and around the globe. Our curriculum is designed to meet the needs of different age groups and learning levels, covering a wide variety of subjects to enhance students' academic achievements and interest in exploration. We offer both interest-oriented classes and test preparation courses for various exams and competition...
